title: pteroceras dalaputtuwa
intro: Pteroceras dalaputtuwa, also known as the "Dala Puttuwa", is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is native to Sri Lanka and is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
